content.query:
SELECT
distinct
cls.emp_id as AGENT_ID
,emp.FirstName + ' ' + emp.LastName as AGENT_NAME
,emp.Active as ACTIVE_INACTIVE
,'FHI' as BRAND_NAME
FROM
ODS.LP_FHI_cls_calls cls
,ODS.LP_FHI_emp_Employees emp
WHERE
cls.emp_id = emp.id
and cls.CallDate >= DATEADD(day, -30, dbo.fnConvertUtcToPST(GETDATE()))
